description: An editor wants to create a permanent 'Story Highlight' on the publication's Instagram profile for a major investigative series.

nodes.task_description: Gather all the Instagram Stories that were posted during the investigation.

expected_outcome.expected: All relevant past stories are collected.

nodes.task_description: Select the best and most informative stories to include in the highlight reel.

expected_outcome.expected: A curated selection of stories is made.

nodes.task_description: Create a new Story Highlight on the Instagram profile.

expected_outcome.expected: A new highlight reel is created.

nodes.task_description: Give the highlight a clear title (e.g., 'The Investigation') and a custom cover photo.

expected_outcome.expected: The highlight is clearly labeled and visually appealing on the profile.
